arts.ttl: Saturday's La Liga predictions including Real Madrid vs. Osasuna
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Real Madrid vs. Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Osasuna 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Camavinga has a very good opportunity to earn the starting job while Tchouameni is injured, so his performances will be worth monitoring as his countryman has struggled a lot early this season. Los Blancos host Osasuna and will try to shake their last two devastating losses off with a convincing performance ahead of the upcoming FIFA break, but Osasuna are currently sitting fifth in the table and they will not make things easy for this struggling Real Madrid side.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti hits back at Kylian Mbappe France snub by Didier Deschamps
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is confident that Kylian Mbappe can turn his form around at Real Madrid after the forward was left out of the French national team by Didier Deschamps.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Osasuna: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Osasuna in La Liga on Saturday afternoon. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Osasuna, 2024 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Osasuna in what will be Los Blancos’ first Liga game since the devastating 4-0 loss in El Clasico . Madrid need to find some momentum and confidence and it will be interesting to see if Ancelotti will deploy any changes to the team’s system.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Osasuna: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Carlo Ancelotti must decide what lineup can collect three points against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé sends rallying cry to Real Madrid fans before Osasuna
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé has taken to social media, to send something of a rallying cry to the club’s fanbase. This comes ahead of Real’s impending return to action.…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Mbappé ‘no longer wants to play’ for France
arts.sum: Real Madrid striker Kylian Mbappé is no longer committed to the cause with the France national team squad. That’s according to French football insider Romain Molina, who has on Friday…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible lineup to play against Osasuna in LaLiga
arts.sum: After damaging home defeats to Barcelona in El Clásico and AC Milan in the Champions League, Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti is likely to revert to type in Saturday’s LaLiga fixture against Osasuna, in which the hosts should line up in a 4-3-3 system. Luka Modric has started two of Madrid’s last three games (against Milan and Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League) but looks likely to be named on the bench against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Preview, Squad List, Team News: Levante Badalona vs. Real Madrid; Liga F
arts.sum: While Eva Navarro is back on the squad list after being unavailable for the Madrid CFF game, there are three absences, 2 of which are new. Las Blancas are in third place with 1 point behind Atlético de Madrid with a game in hand.
